name: KION GROUP AG
description: KION Group AG is a Germany-based global leader in industrial trucks, related services, and supply chain solutions. The company operates through two main segments: Industrial Trucks & Services, which includes forklift trucks, warehouse technology, and related services under brands like Linde, Still, and Baoli; and Supply Chain Solutions, which provides integrated technology and software solutions to optimize supply chains under the Dematic brand. KION Group serves customers in various industries, including logistics, manufacturing, and retail, across more than 100 countries.
